summary.headline: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. issued a second supplemental indenture for its senior notes.
summary.narrative_summary: The filing details the terms and conditions of additional senior notes, including their issuance and terms.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Issued additional senior notes with a total face value of $1,917,887,000.

extraction_notes: Numbers and details are inferred from the filing text; no specific earnings or segment commentary provided.
